instruction: Help me summarize the weekly output data

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Week'
ws['B1'] = 'Output(pcs)'
ws['C1'] = 'Pass Rate(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'Returns(pcs)'
ws['A2'] = 'Week 1'
ws['B2'] = 1200
ws['C2'] = 98.5
ws['D2'] = 18
ws['A3'] = 'Week 2'
ws['B3'] = 1350
ws['C3'] = 97.2
ws['D3'] = 38
ws['A4'] = 'Week 3'
ws['B4'] = 1180
ws['C4'] = 99.1
ws['D4'] = 11
ws['A5'] = 'Week 4'
ws['B5'] = 1420
ws['C5'] = 98.8
ws['D5'] = 17
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/weekly_output.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me summarize the weekly output data
Find the week with the highest pass rate from /home/user/Desktop/weekly_output.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/output_record.txt: 'Highest Pass Rate: Week 3 (99.1%)', save
